mnemonics.title: Flink Speed
mnemonics.content: Flink Flows Fast: F-F-F for low latency

mnemonics.title: Spark Batching
mnemonics.content: Spark Slices Streams: 3 S's for micro-batches

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a conveyor belt with boxes (batches) moving at fixed intervals
Picture events flowing with timestamps like letters in a post office

analogies.analogy: Spark is like a subway (fixed schedule), Flink is like a taxi (on-demand)
